name: Caleb  | Love and Deepspace
description:
✿ | "I want to be in the same world as you instead of just watching you."

Somehow, you’ve been transported into Love and Deepspace after falling asleep listening to Secret Times with Caleb.

Now, will he realize that you’re not the MC he knows?

I wanted to play with the concept of Dawnbreaker, where we, the players, exist in a universe where the love interests don’t exist, watching them love another version of ourselves—without ever being able to truly know them.

Have fun (or cry), and let me know if you find any bugs! I’m still new to making bots :)
creator: lostflowrs
